description: Maps durable harness installation IDs to operating roles. Harness IDs are defined by harness-state/harness-identities.json.

A.assigned_reason: Owner declared Antigravity temporarily unavailable; Codex hosts both Prime Builder and Loyal Opposition roles

B.assigned_reason: Owner directed Claude Code offline/suspended; no active operating role

C.assigned_reason: Owner declared Antigravity temporarily unavailable; no active operating role
